    WHEN [t0].[Id] IS NOT NULL AND [i0].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [i0].[TypeName]
    ELSE NULL
END, [t0].[DepositAmount], [t1].[Email], [t].[GeneratedAt], [t].[ExpiresAt], [t].[RedeemedAt], [t].[ScanAttemptCount]
FROM (
    SELECT [q].[Id], [q].[ExpiresAt], [q].[GeneratedAt], [q].[GeneratedByUserId], [q].[QrCodeNumber], [q].[RedeemedAt], [q].[ScanAttemptCount], [q].[Status]
    FROM [QrCodes] AS [q]

    ORDER BY [q].[GeneratedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [i].[Id], [i].[DepositAmount], [i].[ItemTypeId], [i].[QrCodeId]

) AS [t0] ON [t].[Id] = [t0].[QrCodeId]
LEFT JOIN [ItemTypes] AS [i0] ON [t0].[ItemTypeId] = [i0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[Email]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t].[GeneratedByUserId] = [t1].[Id]
ORDER BY [t].[GeneratedAt] DESC
